meaning: 贝拿勒斯(印度东北部城市瓦腊纳西
examples: I bought the wood soldiers in Benares, India.
Image above: I bought these wood soldiers in Benares, India.
He finally landed in a thorn bush on the outskirts of Benares!
Now this was tremendous entrepreneurship, which in the Victorian era caused the rise of Varanasi or Benares silk.
His photographs of the funeral ghats in Benares--unsettling, riveting, weirdly beautiful--were shown at the Philadelphia Museum of Art.
